author: Alexandra
text: Beautiful as pictured! I got it because I have started to take some medications daily and needed something to always keep a few of my pills with me in my purse without putting the whole bottle. This is perfect and so cute! I will purchase more in sizes! Love it!

author: Jillian
text: I got so many compliments on this! So cute and useful.

author: Carol
text: Beautiful gift that looks so classy. I got it as an award for my friend. Just perfect!

author: Christen
text: Wonderful gift for a friend. I will be ordering another for myself.

author: Jasmin
text: I love this item because it's got that vintage look but it actually feels like it's made of high quality material. I appreciate the little pouch it comes in to keep it protected. The specific design I wanted sold out but they communicated with me and made a few available not long after. I would buy another one.

author: Cree
text: Just what I needed! Really nice quality and works great. Shipped very quick, thank you!!

author: Anu-Samawaati
text: It's a beautiful credit card holder. Very high quality detail!

author: paul
text: So well made! I'm looking for excuses to find more vitamins to take so I can get another one from this store.

author: paul
text: Amazing craftsmanship! Super fast and smooth delivery.

author: Brandi
text: A safe little bed for my Adderall and weed.

author: Aubrey
text: Super cute little pill box! Great quality, nice little compartments, solid closure and comes in a cute little velvet bag. Highly recommend. It's the perfect size!

author: Diana
text: I love the pillbox I received. It is so nice and exactly what I was looking for - the perfect size and great quality. I also couldn't believe how quickly it came. I am very happy with my purchase and with the seller. Thank you so much!!

author: martha
text: So cute! Perfect for my meds. Messaged the seller and they made exactly what I was looking for so quickly!

author: Delia
text: This is the cutest little pill box and I absolutely love it!

author: Denise
text: Beautifully hand crafted and received it on time.

author: Jaclyn
text: Great quality and a beautiful addition to my purse.

author: Stephanie
text: Love my new pill box! Fancy & festive for when I am taking my medications. Arrived very quickly and the seller was very communicative. Really beautiful object.

author: Taylor
text: I'm really happy with this pill organizer! It feels sturdy and well-made, with a nice weight to it that makes it seem like it'll last a long time. The clasp is secure and firm, so I don't have to worry about it popping open, and all of my medications stay neatly in their own compartments without mixing. Amazing customer service on top of a great product. Highly recommend!

author: Johnette
text: The item is beautiful! It came exactly as described. I love the gold detailing, and the item is small enough to fit discreetly in my purse. Super fast shipping!

author: Melka
text: This is a beautifully made pill box and it shipped super fast. I will definitely order additional items from this seller.

author: Martina
text: Great item, beautifully made and as per the photos. So cute and perfect for travel. Holds more pills than I was expecting, which is great. Thanks for fast shipping.

author: Kelly
text: Used it as a ring box for our wedding.

author: Kat
text: The shipping was super fast and the mirror is exactly as described and beautiful in person.

author: Angela
text: This is my second piece from this shop. The seller is wonderful to work with and the pieces are well made and beautiful. I will be gifting for others and myself from this shop again!

author: Nash
text: This is the cutest addition to my everyday bag. Absolutely beautiful and modern vintage.

author: Haley
text: The compact mirror came so well presented. It came with a cute little satchel to prevent scratching, and wrapped in matching gift wrap. It is just as pretty as shown in the pictures on the listing.

author: Lilian
text: The mirror is gorgeous. I get compliments when I pull it out of my purse.

author: Pauli
text: This piece finished the gift set that I put together. The recipient was thrilled.

author: Jennifer
text: Love this item! It was exactly what I wanted.

author: Liz
text: Love my new pocket mirror, thank you!
